title: On The Benefit Received By His Majesty From Sea-Bathing In The Year 1789.
content:
O sovereign of an isle renown�d
    For undisputed sway,
    Wherever o�er yon gulf profound
    Her navies wing their way,


    With juster claims she builds at length
    Her empire on the sea,
    And well may boast the waves her strength,
    Which strength restored to thee.
meaning:
This evocative piece by William Cowper, titled "On The Benefit Received By His Majesty From Sea-Bathing In The Year 1789.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
